title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Queen, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Kawamatsu as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're not hitting him at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you it doesn't matter who I shoot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you aiming at!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those prisoners are already weak from not having enough to eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't forgive you for using viruses as a weapon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not lay a hand on our com- rades!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use these, friends of Luffy-dono!! I am sure that one of them will free you from your cuffs!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
